question: How can I reduce unwanted robocalls and where should I report scam calls?
answer: Use FCC robocall guidance to reduce calls.

retrieved_docs.text: USAGov says the National Do Not Call Registry can reduce telemarketing calls and explains complaint channels.

metadata.title: USAGov telemarketer and scam call complaints

retrieved_docs.text: FTC consumer guidance says illegal robocalls should be reported through DoNotCall.gov and emphasizes call blocking.
